page: Microsoft Azure D64ns_v6 is a network-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Dnv6 server family. It is powered by an Intel processor utilizing the x86_64 CPU architecture. The instance features 64 dedicated virtual CPUs and 256.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. Virtualization is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server type does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external premium storage options, for which the instance is fully capable. There are no integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this configuration. The network-optimized design of the Dnv6 family is engineered to handle workloads requiring high network throughput.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the D64ns_v6 offers a high-density resource profile suitable for enterprise-scale deployments that do not require local NVMe drives. The balanced allocation of compute and memory resources makes it appropriate for general-purpose workloads, network-intensive applications, application servers, and database deployments utilizing premium remote storage.
description: Microsoft Azure D64ns_v6 is an x86_64-based virtual machine within the network-optimized Dnv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying instead on its premium storage capability for remote disk attachments. Designed for network-intensive operations, the server lacks complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Its hardware profile is optimized for workloads requiring significant compute density and high network throughput without the need for local scratch space. The D64ns_v6 is suited for enterprise application servers, network appliances, and database workloads that leverage external premium storage solutions.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D64ns_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine with 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and premium storage capabilities, optimized for high-throughput network workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D64ns_v6 is a network-optimized VM featuring 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and premium storage support.
tagline: A network-optimized virtual machine featuring sixty-four dedicated cores and balanced memory for high-throughput enterprise workloads.

256.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
Premium storage capable with no local disk storage
